installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Coixia Rust Install Script
# The Docker image handles SteamCMD and server installation on first boot.
# This script just sets up required directories and config files.

mkdir -p /mnt/server/server/rust/cfg
mkdir -p /mnt/server/logs

# Create a default server.cfg if it doesn't exist
if [ ! -f /mnt/server/server/rust/cfg/server.cfg ]; then
    cat > /mnt/server/server/rust/cfg/server.cfg << 'EOF'
server.globalchat true
server.stability true
server.radiation true
EOF
fi

# Handle world seed generation for autowipe
if [ "${WORLD_SEED}" == "0" ]; then
    if [ ! -f /mnt/server/seed.txt ]; then
        cat /dev/urandom | tr -dc '1-9' | fold -w 8 | head -n 1 > /mnt/server/seed.txt
        echo "[Coixia] Generated random seed: $(cat /mnt/server/seed.txt)"
    fi
fi

# Handle server regen on reinstall
if [ "${REGEN_SERVER}" == "1" ]; then
    cd /mnt/server/
    echo "[Coixia] Regenerating server, removing: ${REMOVE_FILES}"
    rm -rf ${REMOVE_FILES}
fi

echo "[Coixia] Install complete."

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: The maximum amount of players allowed in the server at once.

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: The name of your server in the public server list. No quotes or backslashes.

variables.name: Level
variables.description: The world file for Rust to use.

variables.name: Description
variables.description: The description under your server title. Commonly used for rules & info. Use \n for newlines. Avoid special characters like quotes.

variables.name: URL
variables.description: The URL for your server. This is what comes up when clicking the "Visit Website" button.

variables.name: World Size
variables.description: World size for procedural map. Min 1000, max 6000. Recommended: 3000-4500 for staging branch.

variables.name: World Seed
variables.description: Seed for procedural map. Use 0 for a random seed each wipe.

variables.name: RCON Password
variables.description: RCON password. Min 8 characters. Letters, numbers, hyphens and dots only. No special characters.

variables.name: Save Interval
variables.description: Sets the server’s auto-save interval in seconds.

variables.name: Additional Arguments
variables.description: Additional startup parameters. Use this to pass +server.levelurl "URL" for custom maps, or any other Rust server parameters.

variables.name: Regen Server
variables.description: If the server should have its files removed and regenerate the server seed on reinstall.

variables.name: Files to remove
variables.description: A space-separated list of files to remove when regenerating the server on reinstall.
variables.default_value: server/rust/player.deaths.*.db server/rust/player.identities.*.db server/rust/player.states.*.db server/rust/player.tokens.db proceduralmap.*.*.*.map server/rust/proceduralmap.*.*.*.sav oxide/data/Kits_Data.json oxide/data/NTeleportationHome.json oxide/data/ServerRewards/player_data.json oxide/data/PTTracker/playtime_data.json

variables.name: Custom Map URL
variables.description: To use a custom map URL, leave this blank and add +server.levelurl "YOUR_URL" to Additional Arguments instead. Remove +server.worldsize and +server.seed from startup if using a custom map.

variables.name: Modding Framework
variables.description: The modding framework to be used: carbon, oxide, vanilla. Defaults to vanilla for a non-modded server installation.

variables.name: Beta Branch
variables.description: SteamCMD branch to download. Use ' -beta staging' for staging, ' -beta aux01' for aux01, etc. Leave blank for standard Rust (public release). Server reinstall required after changing.

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Determines if the server will automatically update on start. Set to 0 to disable.

variables.name: Query Port
variables.description: Port for Steam query connections. Automatically allocated by Wisp.

variables.name: RCON Port
variables.description: Port for RCON connections. Automatically allocated by Wisp.

variables.name: App Port
variables.description: Port for Rust+ app. Automatically allocated by Wisp. Set to -1 in startup to disable.

variables.name: Server Logo
variables.description: URL for the server logo image.
